purpose: Canonical trigger prompts. Each prompt should activate the reason-through skill on every supported host (Claude Code, Codex CLI baseline). Target trigger rate: >=80%.

prompts.input: /reason-through Should we open-source our core library?
/reason-through --full A patient presents with chest pain, elevated troponin, and normal ECG.
/reason-through --families=decision_action,ethical_beyond_formal_norms,economic_institutional_design Should we lay off 15% of engineering to hit quarterly targets?
Help me think through whether to accept a 30% raise that requires relocating to a higher cost-of-living city.
I need a deep analysis of the EU's proposed AI liability rules from multiple angles.
Our distributed system has intermittent data inconsistencies that correlate with peak traffic but no specific deployment. Reason through the possibilities.
Rename the variable userId to user_identifier in src/auth.ts.
What's the syntax for a TypeScript interface?
